SEARCH
Package net.pl3x.guithium.api.gui.element

Interface Element

All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractElement, Rect
public interface Element
Represents an element to be displayed on a Screen.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    @Nullable Point
    getAnchor()
    Get this element's anchor point on the screen.
    @NotNull Key
    getKey()
    Get identifying key.
    @Nullable Point
    getOffset()
    Get this element's position offset.
    @Nullable Point
    getPos()
    Get this element's position from the anchor point.
    Element
    setAnchor(float x, float y)
    Set this element's anchor point on the screen.
    Element
    setAnchor(@Nullable Point anchor)
    Set this element's anchor point on the screen.
    Element

    Set this element's position offset.
    Element

    Set this element's position offset.
    Element
    setPos(float x, float y)
    Set this element's position from the anchor point.
    Element

    Set this element's position from the anchor point.

  • Method Details

    • getKey

      @NotNull @NotNull Key getKey()
      Get identifying key.
      Returns:
      Identifying key

    • getPos

      @Nullable @Nullable Point getPos()
      Get this element's position from the anchor point.
      Returns:
      Position from anchor

    • setPos

      Element setPos(float x, float y)
      Set this element's position from the anchor point.
      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) position
      y - Y (vertical) position
      Returns:
      This element

    • setPos

      Element setPos(@Nullable @Nullable Point pos)
      Set this element's position from the anchor point.
      Parameters:
      pos - Position
      Returns:
      This element

    • getAnchor

      @Nullable @Nullable Point getAnchor()
      Get this element's anchor point on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Returns:
      Anchor point

    • setAnchor

      Element setAnchor(float x, float y)
      Set this element's anchor point on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) anchor
      y - Y (vertical) anchor
      Returns:
      This element

    • setAnchor

      Element setAnchor(@Nullable @Nullable Point anchor)
      Set this element's anchor point on the screen.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the parent's size.

      Parameters:
      anchor - Anchor point
      Returns:
      This element

    • getOffset

      @Nullable @Nullable Point getOffset()
      Get this element's position offset.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the element's size.

      Returns:
      Position offset

    • setOffset

      Element setOffset(float x, float y)
      Set this element's position offset.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the element's size.

      Parameters:
      x - X (horizontal) position offset
      y - Y (vertical) position offset
      Returns:
      This element

    • setOffset

      Element setOffset(@Nullable @Nullable Point offset)
      Set this element's position offset.

      This is represented as a percentage (0.0-1.0) of the element's size.

      Parameters:
      offset - Position offset
      Returns:
      This element
